description: Multi-turn full lifecycle: scaffold -> tar/gzip package -> install -> uninstall (widget CLI has no build subcommand, so we use shell tar; self-bootstraps fixture, no pre-built .tgz needed).

turns.user: Scaffold a minimal widget project via `neomind widget create 'Eval Widget' --widget-type custom -o /tmp/eval-widget-src`.
Use shell tar -czf to package /tmp/eval-widget-src into /tmp/eval-widget.tgz (note: package the directory CONTENTS, not the directory itself, so manifest.json sits at the .tgz root).
Confirm it appears in `neomind widget list`.
Finally uninstall it via `neomind widget uninstall eval-widget`.

per_turn: Turn 1: Agent runs `neomind widget create 'Eval Widget' --widget-type custom -o /tmp/eval-widget-src` and confirms manifest.json + bundle.js were generated
Turn 2: Agent runs shell tar -czf with correct cwd or -C flag so manifest.json lands at package root
Turn 3: Agent runs `neomind widget install /tmp/eval-widget.tgz` and parses the widget id
Turn 4: Agent runs `neomind widget list` and locates the newly installed widget in results
expectations.overall: If widget validation fails (e.g. manifest schema mismatch), agent must surface the error message; turn 1 scaffold and turn 5 uninstall must still execute
